title: Nashik, Maharashtra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nashik, Maharashtra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nashik is a city in Maharashtra with a population of 1,600,000. A historic city on the Godavari River, known as the wine capital of India and a major Hindu pilgrimage site.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
